title: Spencer Foundation awards Zhou team a Small Research Grant
summary_en: The Spencer Foundation awarded Xiang Zhou a Small Research Grant for education research. Zhou, associate professor of counseling psychology in the College’s Department of Educational Studies, is the PI with co-PI Yukiko Maeda, professor of educational psychology and research methodology…
title_cn: 斯宾塞基金会授予周团队小额研究补助金
